name: FDS: MCP Lookup Tool - Vinyl Railing

nodes.name: When Executed from MCP Trigger Call

parameters.name: sql
parameters.value: WITH filtered AS (SELECT sku, family_code, name, price, design, width_ft, height_ft, color, is_picket, box_qty, vendor_sku, note FROM Products_summary_active_description_family_code_name_price_sku_unit_code WHERE family_code = 1 AND (is_picket IS NOT TRUE) AND active = true) SELECT *, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM filtered) AS total_count FROM filtered ORDER BY price DESC, design, height_ft, width_ft, color LIMIT 100
